payload.answer: In admin SQL select-only mode, SELECT queries on memory_cards are allowed (e.g., SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10), while DELETE operations are explicitly denied.

entity_resolution.reason: No entity resolution required; all entities are explicitly defined in the input and schema-compliant.

memory_cards.statement: SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 is permitted in admin SQL select-only mode
DELETE FROM memory_cards is denied in admin SQL select-only mode

details: Only SELECT permitted; DELETE denied as per SQL select-only mode constraints.
Memory cards generated reflect current, non-superseded permissions.
JSON output adheres strictly to requested schema.
